assignments.name: raw_content
assignments.value: Verified n8n Creator is an official member of the n8n Automation Workflows Creators program. They design, build, and share n8n workflows with the community. This badge demonstrates professional automation capabilities. Creators often come from Marketing, Product, Dev, or Business backgrounds - not necessarily programmers. The goal of the program is to build a high-quality workflow library to make n8n easier to adopt.

assignments.name: content_style
assignments.value: Professional, inspiring, tailored for the automation and no-code/low-code community. Confident, brief, and concise tone. A light touch of humor can be used.

nodes.name: AI Agent: Write Post & Image Prompt

options.systemMessage:
=## ROLE
You are a social media copywriting expert for the Fanpage **{{ $('Set Context').item.json.fanpage_name }}**.

## STYLE & TONE
{{ $('Set Context').item.json.content_style }}

## MISSION
Based on the provided raw content, you will:
1. Write a complete, engaging Facebook post suitable for the fanpage and its style.
2. Create a detailed image prompt to generate a matching illustration.

## FACEBOOK POST RULES

### Structure:
- **Hook:** The first 1-2 sentences must be extremely engaging to make the reader stop scrolling. Use a question, a shocking fact, or a strong statement.
- **Body:** Develop the main idea from the raw content concisely and with depth. Use line breaks after each point for mobile readability.
- **CTA (Call-to-Action):** End with a specific, natural call to action (e.g., "Are you using automation yet?", "Tag someone who needs to know this 👇", "Save this for later 🔖").
- **Hashtags:** 4-6 relevant hashtags, placed at the end of the post on a separate line.

### Strict Requirements:
- Use emojis naturally, do not overuse (3-6 emojis/post).
- Length: 100-250 words.
- Write in {{ $('Set Context').item.json.language }} (hashtags can be mixed).
- DO NOT use bullet points (•) in the text, use line breaks instead.
- DO NOT insert direct links into the post.
- The tone must be consistent with the fanpage style.

## IMAGE PROMPT RULES

### Prompt Structure:
`[Art Style], [Main Subject Description], [Background Setting], [Lighting & Colors], [Mood/Emotion], [Technical Details]`

### Strict Requirements:
- Style: {{ $json.content_style }}
- Colors: Vibrant but not garish, matching the content.
- DO NOT include identifiable real human faces.
- The image MUST relate DIRECTLY to the post content.
- Describe the layout and text hierarchy clearly if applying text to the image.
- Any text in the image (titles, content) must use {{ $('Set Context').item.json.language }}.
- If a reference image is provided: Carefully review the layout to generate an appropriate, adhering prompt that guides the model on what to follow and what details to alter. Title should be standardized to {{ $json.language }}.

## OUTPUT FORMAT
Output JSON with the exact structure:
{
  "post_text": "Complete Facebook post content",
  "image_prompt": "Image generation prompt"
}

**ABSOLUTELY DO NOT** add text, markdown, or explanations outside the JSON.

parameters.jsonSchemaExample:
{
  "post_text": "✨ Powerful hook to make the reader stop scrolling.

Develop main content from raw input, concise with depth.

Next line with the next idea.

Natural CTA, calling for a specific action 👇

#Hashtag1 #Hashtag2 #Hashtag3 #Hashtag4",
  "image_prompt": "Modern digital illustration of [subject related to content], [detailed visual description], [background setting], [lighting style], [color palette], professional social media aesthetic, square 1:1 aspect ratio, high quality, ultra detailed"
}

parameters.prompt:
={{ $('AI Agent: Write Post & Image Prompt').item.json.output.image_prompt }}

IMPORTANT REQUIREMENTS:
- Keep the overall composition and main subject from the original image
- Enhance colors to be more vibrant and eye-catching for social media
- Apply a modern, professional aesthetic
- Make it suitable as a Facebook post image
- Ensure 1:1 square format
- High quality output

={{ $('AI Agent: Write Post & Image Prompt').item.json.output.image_prompt }}

CRITICAL REQUIREMENTS:
- Create a stunning, professional image for a Facebook post
- Style: modern, clean, visually striking and scroll-stopping
- Perfect square 1:1 composition
- High contrast and vibrant colors that work on mobile screens
- NO text, letters, words, or typography in the image
- NO real identifiable people or celebrities
- Focus on concepts, objects, abstract elements, or illustrations
- Ultra high quality, sharp details

parameters.content:
## Facebook AI Post Creator: Auto-Write & Generate Images

This workflow automatically generates professional **Facebook posts** and matching illustrations from raw text. It operates seamlessly in two modes: remixing an existing image with new copy, or generating a completely new image from scratch using **Google Gemini**.

### How it works
1. **Trigger:** Receives input data manually or from any source (Webhook, Google Sheets, etc.).
2. **Configuration:** The `Set Context` node standardizes the raw content, target fanpage name, brand style, and optional original image URL.
3. **AI Generation:** A Gemini AI Agent writes the Facebook post and crafts a highly detailed prompt for the image generation model.
4. **Image Processing:** The workflow branches based on image presence. If an original image exists, Gemini beautifully edits/remixes it. If not, Gemini generates a brand-new illustration based on the AI's prompt.
5. **Delivery:** The final post (caption + binary image data) is published directly to your Facebook Page.

### Setup
* [ ] Connect **Google Gemini** credentials in all AI nodes (`googlePalmApi`).
* [ ] Connect **Facebook Graph API** credentials in the `Post to Facebook` node.
* [ ] Edit the **Set Context** node to update `raw_content`, `fanpage_name`, `content_style`, and your `page_access_token`.
* [ ] Activate the workflow and test.

### Customization tips
* **Change trigger:** Swap the Manual Trigger for a Webhook or Schedule trigger for full automation.
* **Different AI Model:** You can replace Gemini Flash with another LLM for text, but image generation requires compatible image models.

### LICENCE
This template is shared free of charge. Copyright belongs to Nguyen Thieu Toan. Any copying or modification must credit the author.

## Section 1: Trigger & Input Configuration
Receives raw data from any source. The **Set Context** node defines the raw text, target fanpage, writing style, language, and image preferences.

## Section 2: AI Content Generation
The **Gemini AI Agent** receives the raw content and outputs two structured elements: a Facebook-ready caption (with emojis & hashtags) and a precise image generation prompt.

## Section 3: Image Creation & Processing
Routes the workflow based on the presence of an image URL. It either downloads and **edits the original image** using Gemini, or **generates a brand-new image** based on the AI's prompt.

## Section 4: Facebook Publishing
Publishes the final composed image and AI-generated caption directly to the **Facebook Fanpage** via Graph API, then formats the execution results.

## ⚠️ Edit this node!

Update the `raw_content` and configure your Fanpage details here before running.

## Author Message

Hi! I am **Nguyen Thieu Toan (Jay Nguyen)** — a Verified n8n Creator and CEO/Founder of **GenStaff**. Thank you for using this template!

This workflow is shared with you for free. If it brings value to your work, optimizes your operations, or saves you time, you can buy me a coffee here: **[My Donate Website](https://nguyenthieutoan.com/payment/)** *(PayPal, Momo, Bank Transfer)*
